release_notes: V14.44 build 192 Nightscout properties compile-fix release: reads Nightscout /api/v2/properties/iob,cob every 1 minute for IOB and COB, reads /api/v2/properties/sage every hour for sensor age when available, adds COB and sensor age widget support, uses Nightscout IOB as the primary insulin trend source with local insulin decay retained as fallback, preserves manual sensor age setup in the Web UI, and includes the build 192 compile fix for the Nightscout IOB trend sample timer declaration.
